resources.title: Komodor Tutorial Part 1: Deploying the Agent
resources.evidence_quote: If you haven't seen part one, pause this and go watch it now. In part one, I show you how to deploy the Komodor agent to your Kubernetes cluster.

resources.title: Sentry
resources.evidence_quote: Sentry is something that if you're an application developer, you probably already know. It's an open source tool that you integrate into your application.
